Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Answers To Admission Requests, Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Documents, And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Giovanni Zocca's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Admission Requests, Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Documents is denied, except as it seeks verifications. One basis for the court's ruling is the lack of compliance with C.R.C. 3.1020. However, from the opposition, it is clear that passport entries and bank statements are at issue. The court finds that as the motion seeks further production, the requests are an invasion of the right to privacy for which there is no good cause. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
